amendment_reason: Pilot 01 exposed model-output protocol nonconformance and empty retrieval. Split mechanistic PMM behavior from naturalistic model behavior before further pilots.

protocol_gate.retrieval_prompt: Retrieve the event and commitment associated with protocol.compatibility. Do not emit a control marker.

initial_concept_definitions.definition: Durable memory whose later use remains attributable and revisable
Continuity of identity supported by accurate relational development

prompts.label: fallback_distractor
prompts.prompt: Record an unrelated basil observation without declaring concepts.

prompts.label: declared_relationship
prompts.prompt: Crystallize the persistent-memory relationship using the PMM protocol.

replies: Basil roots need drainage and moderate moisture.
The retrieved relationship distinguishes durable storage from attributable, revisable continuity.
